limits.maxGroupsWith3: You already have 8 groups with 3 teams. This group must stay at 2.

1.title: Choose a template
1.desc: Pick a ready-made tournament template (e.g. FIFA World Cup 2026) or start from scratch. Templates come pre-loaded with groups, categories, and scoring rules.

2.title: Name and customize
2.desc: Give your tournament a name, pick an accent color, and write a short description. The URL slug is auto-generated from the name.

3.title: Pay or use a credit
3.desc: Creating a tournament costs €2 (one-time). If you have free credits, it's instant. Payment is secure via Stripe.

4.title: Configure in the editor
4.desc: After creation, the full editor opens. Set up prediction categories, matches, rules, rewards, branding, and visibility. Everything is bilingual (BS/EN).

5.title: Publish and share
5.desc: Switch the status to 'Published' and share the link. Friends open it, sign in, and submit their predictions before the lock date.

templates.title: Templates
templates.desc: World Cup 2026 template with all 48 teams, 12 groups, knockout rounds, and scoring pre-configured.

categories.title: Prediction types
categories.desc: Winner, top scorer, group winners, exact scores, ranked picks, free text, and more.

matches.title: Match predictions
matches.desc: Add individual matches with per-match scoring. Lock by match or by round.

bilingual.title: Bilingual
bilingual.desc: Every label, rule, and reward can be written in both Bosnian and English. Users see their preferred language.

privacy.title: Public or private
privacy.desc: Open to everyone, or require admin approval for each member. You control who plays.

scoring.title: Auto-scoring
scoring.desc: Set correct answers in the editor. Points are calculated automatically and the leaderboard updates in real time.

hero.title: Predict. Compete. Win.
hero.subtitle: The official Remis Predictor. call group standings, finalists, top scorers and the champion of the world's biggest tournaments. One bracket. One leaderboard. Real rewards.

standings.emptyDesc: Will appear once participants submit predictions.

validation.savedIncomplete: Saved, but these picks aren't complete yet

cta.tagline: Run a private league for friends, or a public tournament for the whole community.

loginRequired.title: Sign in to create a tournament
loginRequired.subtitle: Creating a tournament requires an account. Signing in takes 10 seconds and your tournament is instantly linked to you as the owner.

perks.title: What you get with an account

items.ownership: Full owner access to every tournament you create
items.tracking: Track all your tournaments and stats in one place
items.google: One-click Google sign-in. no new passwords

mine.title: Your collection
mine.subtitle: Every tournament you've created. Click any one to open the editor and keep building.

empty.title: No tournaments yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first tournament for €2 and invite friends to compete on predictions.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Pick a template and the basics. including categories and scoring. fill in automatically. Everything is editable afterwards.

wc.name: World Cup 2026
wc.short: FIFA World Cup. winner, top scorer, top 4, finalists

pl.name: Premier League 2025/26
pl.short: English Premier League. winner, top scorer, top 4

cl.name: Champions League 2025/26
cl.short: UEFA Champions League. winner, finalists, best keeper

bundes.name: Bundesliga 2025/26
bundes.short: German Bundesliga. winner, top scorer, top 3

laliga.name: La Liga 2025/26
laliga.short: Spanish La Liga. winner, top scorer, top 4

f1.name: Formula 1 2026
f1.short: F1 season. driver, constructor, pole position

templates.pickHint: Click a template to auto-fill the form.

create.subtitle: Run a private prediction tournament for friends, colleagues, or your company. or an open one for the whole community. The same engine that powers Remis Fantasy's official competitions, now in your hands.

pricing.label: One-time
pricing.note: Per tournament. No subscription, no hidden fees.

ownership.title: Full owner access
ownership.desc: You are the sole administrator. No one touches your tournament except you.

categories.title: Rich prediction categories
categories.desc: Winner, top scorer, top 4, exact score, free text. every category type available.

scoring.title: Automatic and manual scoring
scoring.desc: Let the system calculate, or override points by hand for edge cases.

visibility.title: Public or private
visibility.desc: Open it to every signed-in user, or keep it invite-only.

branding.title: Your own brand
branding.desc: Logo, banner, accent color, sponsor. Your tournament looks like a finished product.

bilingual.title: Bosnian and English
bilingual.desc: Every text field has a BS and EN counterpart for international audiences.

step1.label: Pay
step1.desc: Secure Stripe card payment. Your tournament is created instantly as a draft.

step2.label: Customise
step2.desc: Categories, rules, prizes, banner, sponsor. All via the admin-grade editor.

step3.label: Publish
step3.desc: Switch status to 'published' and share the link. Predictions begin.

footer.terms: By paying you agree the charge is one-time and non-refundable once the tournament is created.

fields.name: Tournament name
fields.nameHint: The name shown to everyone who enters the tournament.
fields.shortDescHint: Shown in the tournament list (up to 200 characters).
fields.shortDescPlaceholder: A quick line about what this is (optional)
fields.accentHint: You can change this later in the editor.
fields.cardholderHint: Exactly as it appears on your card (first and last name).

form.stripeNote: Your card details go straight to Stripe. they never touch our server.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.nameMax: Name can have at most 80 characters.
errors.slugFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers and dashes allowed.
errors.cardholderRequired: Enter the name on the card.
errors.cardholderFullName: Enter both first and last name.
errors.stripeNotReady: Stripe isn't ready yet. give it a second.
errors.paymentIncomplete: Payment did not complete. Try again.
errors.tournamentDelay: Payment succeeded, but the tournament isn't created yet. Check 'My tournaments' in a few seconds.

toast.templateApplied: Template applied. categories, rules and rewards seeded
toast.tournamentPublished: Tournament published. now visible to all users
toast.tournamentLocked: Predictions locked. no more changes allowed
toast.genericError: Something went wrong. please try again

draft.title: Tournament not published
draft.desc: Without the "Published" status, nobody can see or join this tournament.

published.title: Live and visible
published.desc: Signed-in users can see the tournament and place predictions.

locked.title: Predictions locked
locked.desc: No new predictions accepted. score the results.

finished.title: Tournament closed
finished.desc: This tournament is closed. You can move it back to draft.

basics.title: Basic information
basics.desc: Name, URL and short description shown to everyone.

fields.name: Tournament name
fields.englishHint: EN version is shown to users on English language.

lockMode.title: Prediction locking
lockMode.desc: How predictions lock as matches approach.

per_match.label: Per match
per_match.desc: Each match locks at its own kickoff time

per_round.label: Per round
per_round.desc: All matches in a round lock when the first match of that round starts

visibility.title: Visibility & status
visibility.desc: Control who sees the tournament and whether it's live.
visibility.statusHint: Set to "Published" when you're ready for predictions.
visibility.visibilityHint: Private tournaments don't appear in lists. only via direct link.
visibility.approvalHint: If on, every new member must be approved by you.
visibility.approvalOff: All signed-in users can join immediately

timestamps.title: Dates & deadlines
timestamps.lockHint: After this point, predictions are locked.

branding.title: Images & brand
branding.orUseUrl: Or use a direct link below

settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this tournament? This cannot be undone.

categoriesTab.title: Prediction categories
categoriesTab.empty: No categories yet. Add the first one so users can predict.

matchesTab.title: Matches (optional)
matchesTab.desc: Match-by-match predictions with automatic scoring from results.
matchesTab.empty: No matches yet. Match predictions are optional. the tournament works with categories alone.

editor.finalScoreHint: Enter once the match is done. scoring runs automatically across all predictions.

rulesTab.title: Rules / info
rulesTab.desc: Cards displayed on the tournament's public page (Markdown).

rewardsTab.title: Rewards
rewardsTab.desc: By rank (1st, 2nd, 3rd) or category-specific bonus prizes.

membersTab.title: Tournament members
membersTab.approvalsOn: Approval mode is on. you must approve every new member.
membersTab.approvalsOff: All signed-in users can join. You can still ban them.

scoringTab.rescoreConfirm: Recalculate every prediction's points from the correct answers? Manual edits may be overwritten.
scoringTab.leaderboardEmpty: No standings yet. The table appears as soon as users predict and correct answers are set.
scoringTab.footerHint: Point edits auto-save when you leave the field. "Locked" stops future auto-rescore from overwriting them.

empty.title: No active tournaments yet
empty.subtitle: Predictor tournaments only drop right before the biggest competitions. the World Cup, the Euros, the Champions League. Check back soon and get ready to climb the leaderboard.

prizes.title: Real prizes
prizes.desc: Sponsored tournaments with concrete rewards for winners.

leaderboard.title: Global leaderboard
leaderboard.desc: Points stack across the tournament. climb to the top.

lock.title: Sharp predictions
lock.desc: Submit your picks before kickoff. Fair and transparent.

noPredictionsToSave: Nothing to save. make a pick first.

notFound.title: Tournament not found
notFound.subtitle: This tournament doesn't exist or hasn't been published by the admin yet.
notFound.hint: Tournaments become visible once the organizer sets them to 'Published'. Check back soon or browse active tournaments.

errors.title: Not saved
errors.mustSignIn: You must be signed in to save predictions. Click Sign in above.
errors.nothingToSave: Nothing to save. enter scores first (use + and − buttons).
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.notAllowed: You don't have permission for this tournament. Request to join if needed.
errors.tournamentNotAcceptingPredictions: This tournament isn't accepting predictions right now.
errors.draftMessage: Tournament hasn't been published yet. Admin must publish it before predictions can be saved.
errors.lockedMessage: Tournament is locked or finished. predictions can no longer be changed.
errors.matchSkipped: Predictions weren't saved. Reasons: {{reasons}}. Check that matches aren't locked.

noMatches: No match schedule yet. Check back later.

signInBanner.message: Sign in to submit predictions and compete for rewards.

tapTeamHint: Tap a team to add a goal · hold to reset

limits.groupOneHit: Only 1 winner per group. tap replaces the previous pick
limits.rankedSwap: Top {{max}} is full. your earliest pick was replaced
limits.tooManyForGroup: You can't pick {{count}} from one group

explorer.title: Predictions overview
explorer.subtitle: Every prediction from every user. by day, by match, and by tournament category.
explorer.noAwardsYet: Tournament template has no categories with predictions.
explorer.selectUser: Pick a user from the leaderboard

theme.title: WC 2026 theme (World Cup only)
theme.description: Background image and theme music only activate for the tournament you explicitly opt in here. Other tournaments stay clean.
theme.musicHint: When on, the tournament page shows a toggle for the FIFA WC 2026 anthem. State is remembered per user. autoplay-block keeps it from playing without consent.

share.title: Tournament created
share.subtitle: Share the link with friends and start competing.
share.hint: Anyone who opens this link can sign up and start predicting.

approvals.title: Membership approvals
approvals.subtitle: Approve, reject or ban participation requests.
approvals.confirmRemove: Remove this member from the tournament?
approvals.disabledBody: Every signed-in user can predict immediately. To enable the approval system, go to Settings and turn on "Require admin approval".
